stemHtml: When would the pilot become aware of an SBAS outage due to an unplanned inoperative condition?

options.a: When checking the NOTAMs and RAIM outages prior to a flight.
options.b: During the preflight briefing of a flight where SBAS is to be used.
options.c: At least 60 minutes before SBAS becomes inoperative.
options.d: During the flight where SBAS is planned to be used, and it may be necessary to use a backup source of navigation.
